verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Israël : Ruben, Simeon, Levi, Juda, Issachar, et Zabulon,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל רְאוּבֵ֤ן שִׁמְעוֹן֙ לֵוִ֣י וִיהוּדָ֔ה יִשָּׂשכָ֖ר וּזְבֻלֽוּן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And these are the sons of Israel: Ruben, Simeon, Levi, Juda, Issachar, and Zabulon,
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat Israelin lapset: Ruben, Simeon, Levi ja Juuda, Isaskar ja Sebulon,
verses.king_james: These are the sons of Israel; Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah, Issachar, and Zebulun,

verses.latin_vulgate: Dan, Joseph, Benjamin, Nephthali, Gad, et Aser.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דָּ֚ן יוֹסֵ֣ף וּבִנְיָמִ֔ן נַפְתָּלִ֖י גָּ֥ד וְאָשֵֽׁר׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Dan, Joseph, Benjamin, Nephtali, Gad, and Aser.
verses.finnish_biblia: Dan, Joseph ja Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad ja Asser.
verses.king_james: Dan, Joseph, and Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Juda : Her, Onan, et Sela : hi tres nati sunt ei de filia Sue Chananitide. Fuit autem Her primogenitus Juda malus coram Domino, et occidit eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֗ה עֵ֤ר וְאוֹנָן֙ וְשֵׁלָ֔ה שְׁלוֹשָׁה֙ נ֣וֹלַד ל֔וֹ מִבַּת־שׁ֖וּעַ הַֽכְּנַעֲנִ֑ית וַיְהִ֞י עֵ֣ר ׀ בְּכ֣וֹר יְהוּדָ֗ה רַ֛ע בְּעֵינֵ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה וַיְמִיתֵֽהוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Juda: Her, Onan and Sela. These three were born to him of the Chanaanitess the daughter of Sue. And Her the firstborn of Juda, was wicked in the sight of the Lord, and he slew him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Juudan lapset: Ger, Onan, Sela, ne kolme synnytti hänelle Suan tytär Kanaanealainen. Ja Ger Juudan esikoinen oli paha Herran edessä, sentähden tappoi hän hänen.
verses.king_james: The sons of Judah; Er, and Onan, and Shelah: which three were born unto him of the daughter of Shua the Canaanitess. And Er, the firstborn of Judah, was evil in the sight of the Lord; and he slew him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Thamar autem nurus ejus peperit ei Phares et Zara : omnes ergo filii Juda, quinque.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְתָמָר֙ כַּלָּת֔וֹ יָ֥לְדָה לּ֖וֹ אֶת־פֶּ֣רֶץ וְאֶת־זָ֑רַח כׇּל־בְּנֵ֥י יְהוּדָ֖ה חֲמִשָּֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Thamar his daughter in law bore him Phares and Zara. So all the sons of Juda were five.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Tamar hänen miniänsä synnytti hänelle Peretsen ja Seran, niin että Juudan lapsia oli kaikkiansa viisi.
verses.king_james: And Tamar his daughter in law bare him Pharez and Zerah. All the sons of Judah were five.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Phares : Hesron et Hamul.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי־פֶ֖רֶץ חֶצְר֥וֹן וְחָמֽוּל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Phares, were Hesron and Hamul.
verses.finnish_biblia: Peretsen lapset: Hetsron ja Hamul.
verses.king_james: The sons of Pharez; Hezron, and Hamul.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii quoque Zaræ : Zamri, et Ethan, et Eman, Chalchal quoque, et Dara, simul quinque.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י זֶ֗רַח זִ֠מְרִ֠י וְאֵיתָ֧ן וְהֵימָ֛ן וְכַלְכֹּ֥ל וָדָ֖רַע כֻּלָּ֥ם חֲמִשָּֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons also of Zare: Zamri, and Ethan, and Eman, and Chalchal, and Dara, five in all.
verses.finnish_biblia: Seran lapset: Simri, Etan, Heman, Kalkol ja Dara: ja heitä kaikkiansa oli myös viisi.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Zerah; Zimri, and Ethan, and Heman, and Calcol, and Dara: five of them in all.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Charmi : Achar, qui turbavit Israël, et peccavit in furto anathematis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י כַּרְמִ֑י עָכָר֙ עוֹכֵ֣ר יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אֲשֶׁ֥ר מָעַ֖ל בַּחֵֽרֶם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Charmi: Achar, who troubled Israel, and sinned by the theft of the anathema.
verses.finnish_biblia: Karmin lapset: Akar, joka Israelin murheelliseksi saatti, ryhtyissänsä kirottuun.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Carmi; Achar, the troubler of Israel, who transgressed in the thing accursed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Ethan : Azarias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֥י אֵיתָ֖ן עֲזַרְיָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Ethan: Azarias,
verses.finnish_biblia: Etanin lapset, Asaria.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Ethan; Azariah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Hesron qui nati sunt ei : Jerameel, et Ram, et Calubi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֥י חֶצְר֖וֹן אֲשֶׁ֣ר נֽוֹלַד־ל֑וֹ אֶת־יְרַחְמְאֵ֥ל וְאֶת־רָ֖ם וְאֶת־כְּלוּבָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Hesron that were born to him: Jerameel, and Ram, and Calubi.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hetsronin lapset, jotka hänelle ovat syntyneet: Jerahmeel, Ram ja Kalubai.
verses.king_james: The sons also of Hezron, that were born unto him; Jerahmeel, and Ram, and Chelubai.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Ram genuit Aminadab. Aminadab autem genuit Nahasson, principem filiorum Juda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרָ֖ם הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־עַמִּֽינָדָ֑ב וְעַמִּֽינָדָב֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־נַחְשׁ֔וֹן נְשִׂ֖יא בְּנֵ֥י יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Ram begot Aminadab, and Aminadab begot Nahasson, prince of the children of Juda.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ram siitti Amminadabin; Amminadab siitti Nahessonin, Juudan lasten päämiehen.
verses.king_james: And Ram begat Amminadab; and Amminadab begat Nahshon, prince of the children of Judah;

verses.latin_vulgate: Nahasson quoque genuit Salma, de quo ortus est Booz.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנַחְשׁוֹן֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־שַׂלְמָ֔א וְשַׂלְמָ֖א הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־בֹּֽעַז׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Nahasson begot Salma, the father of Booz.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nahesson siitti Salman; Salma siitti Boaksen.
verses.king_james: And Nahshon begat Salma, and Salma begat Boaz,

verses.latin_vulgate: Booz vero genuit Obed, qui et ipse genuit Isai.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבֹ֙עַז֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־עוֹבֵ֔ד וְעוֹבֵ֖ד הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־יִשָֽׁי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Booz begot Obed, and Obed begot Isai.
verses.finnish_biblia: Boas siitti Obedin; Obed siitti Isain.
verses.king_james: And Boaz begat Obed, and Obed begat Jesse,

verses.latin_vulgate: Isai autem genuit primogenitum Eliab, secundum Abinadab, tertium Simmaa,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִישַׁ֛י הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־בְּכֹר֖וֹ אֶת־אֱלִיאָ֑ב וַאֲבִֽינָדָב֙ הַשֵּׁנִ֔י וְשִׁמְעָ֖א הַשְּׁלִשִֽׁי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Isai begot Eliab his firstborn, the second Abinadab, the third Simmaa,
verses.finnish_biblia: Isai siitti esikoisensa Eliabin, toisen Abinadabin, kolmannen Simean,
verses.king_james: And Jesse begat his firstborn Eliab, and Abinadab the second, and Shimma the third,

verses.latin_vulgate: quartum Nathanaël, quintum Raddai,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נְתַנְאֵל֙ הָרְבִיעִ֔י רַדַּ֖י הַחֲמִישִֽׁי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The fourth, Nathanael, the fifth Raddai,
verses.finnish_biblia: Neljännen Netaneelin, viidennen Raddain,
verses.king_james: Nethaneel the fourth, Raddai the fifth,

verses.latin_vulgate: sextum Asom, septimum David.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹ֚צֶם הַשִּׁשִּׁ֔י דָּוִ֖יד הַשְּׁבִעִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sixth Asom, the seventh David.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuudennen Otsemin ja seitsemännen Davidin.
verses.king_james: Ozem the sixth, David the seventh:

verses.latin_vulgate: Quorum sorores fuerunt Sarvia et Abigail. Filii Sarviæ : Abisai, Joab, et Asaël, tres.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַחְיֹתֵיהֶ֖ם צְרוּיָ֣ה וַאֲבִיגָ֑יִל וּבְנֵ֣י צְרוּיָ֗ה אַבְשַׁ֛י וְיוֹאָ֥ב וַעֲשָׂהאֵ֖ל שְׁלֹשָֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And their sisters were Sarvia, and Abigail. The sons of Sarvia: Abisai, Joab, and Asael, three.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän sisarensa olivat Seruja ja Abigail. Serujan lapset: Abisai, Joab ja Asael, ne kolme.
verses.king_james: Whose sisters were Zeruiah, and Abigail. And the sons of Zeruiah; Abishai, and Joab, and Asahel, three.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abigail autem genuit Amasa, cujus pater fuit Jether Ismahelites.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲבִיגַ֕יִל יָלְדָ֖ה אֶת־עֲמָשָׂ֑א וַאֲבִ֣י עֲמָשָׂ֔א יֶ֖תֶר הַיִּשְׁמְעֵאלִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Abigail bore Amasa, whose father was Jether the Ismahelite.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Abigail synnytti Amasan; ja Jeter Ismaelilainen oli Amasan isä.
verses.king_james: And Abigail bare Amasa: and the father of Amasa was Jether the Ishmeelite.

verses.latin_vulgate: Caleb vero filius Hesron accepit uxorem nomine Azuba, de qua genuit Jerioth : fueruntque filii ejus Jaser, et Sobab, et Ardon.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכָלֵ֣ב בֶּן־חֶצְר֗וֹן הוֹלִ֛יד אֶת־עֲזוּבָ֥ה אִשָּׁ֖ה וְאֶת־יְרִיע֑וֹת וְאֵ֣לֶּה בָנֶ֔יהָ יֵ֥שֶׁר וְשׁוֹבָ֖ב וְאַרְדּֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Caleb the son of Hesron took a wife named Azuba, of whom he had Jerioth: and her sons were Jaser, and Sobab, and Ardon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaleb Hetsronin poika siitti emäntäinsä Asuban ja Jerigodin kanssa, nämät ovat hänen lapsensa: Jeser, Sobad ja Ardon.
verses.king_james: And Caleb the son of Hezron begat children of Azubah his wife, and of Jerioth: her sons are these; Jesher, and Shobab, and Ardon.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque mortua fuisset Azuba, accepit uxorem Caleb Ephratha, quæ peperit ei Hur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתָּ֖מׇת עֲזוּבָ֑ה וַיִּֽקַּֽח־ל֤וֹ כָלֵב֙ אֶת־אֶפְרָ֔ת וַתֵּ֥לֶד ל֖וֹ אֶת־חֽוּר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Azuba was dead, Caleb took to wife Ephrata: who bore him Hur.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin Asuba kuoli, otti Kaleb itsellensä Ephratin, joka synnytti hänelle Hurin.
verses.king_james: And when Azubah was dead, Caleb took unto him Ephrath, which bare him Hur.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Hur genuit Uri, et Uri genuit Bezeleel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחוּר֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־אוּרִ֔י וְאוּרִ֖י הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־בְּצַלְאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Hur begot Uri: and Uri begot Bezeleel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hur siitti Urin ja Uri siitti Betsaleelin.
verses.king_james: And Hur begat Uri, and Uri begat Bezaleel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Post hæc ingressus est Hesron ad filiam Machir patris Galaad, et accepit eam cum esset annorum sexaginta : quæ peperit ei Segub.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַחַ֗ר בָּ֤א חֶצְרוֹן֙ אֶל־בַּת־מָכִיר֙ אֲבִ֣י גִלְעָ֔ד וְה֣וּא לְקָחָ֔הּ וְה֖וּא בֶּן־שִׁשִּׁ֣ים שָׁנָ֑ה וַתֵּ֥לֶד ל֖וֹ אֶת־שְׂגֽוּב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And afterwards Hesron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Galaad, and took her to wife when he was threescore years old: and she bore him Segub.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte meni Hetsron Makirin Gileadin isän tyttären tykö ja nai hänen, kuin hän oli kuudenkymmenen ajastaikainen; ja hän synnytti hänelle Segubin.
verses.king_james: And afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead, whom he married when he was threescore years old; and she bare him Segub.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et Segub genuit Jair, et possedit viginti tres civitates in terra Galaad.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּשְׂג֖וּב הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־יָאִ֑יר וַֽיְהִי־ל֗וֹ עֶשְׂרִ֤ים וְשָׁלוֹשׁ֙ עָרִ֔ים בְּאֶ֖רֶץ הַגִּלְעָֽד׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Segub begot Jair, and he had three and twenty cities in the land of Galaad.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Segub siitti Jairin; ja hänellä oli kolmekolmattakymmentä kaupunkia Gileadin maakunnassa.
verses.king_james: And Segub begat Jair, who had three and twenty cities in the land of Gilead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cepitque Gessur et Aram oppida Jair, et Canath, et viculos ejus sexaginta civitatum : omnes isti filii Machir patris Galaad.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֣ח גְּשֽׁוּר־וַ֠אֲרָ֠ם אֶת־חַוֺּ֨ת יָאִ֧יר מֵאִתָּ֛ם אֶת־קְנָ֥ת וְאֶת־בְּנֹתֶ֖יהָ שִׁשִּׁ֣ים עִ֑יר כׇּל־אֵ֕לֶּה בְּנֵ֖י מָכִ֥יר אֲבִֽי־גִלְעָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he took Gessur, and Aram the towns of Jair, and Canath, and the villages thereof, threescore cities. All these, the sons of Machir father of Galaad.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Gesur ja Aram saivat heiltä Jairin kylät, Kenatin ja hänen tyttärensä, kuusikymmentä kaupunkia: kaikki nämät ovat Makirin Gileadin isän lapset.
verses.king_james: And he took Geshur, and Aram, with the towns of Jair, from them, with Kenath, and the towns thereof, even threescore cities. All these belonged to the sons of Machir the father of Gilead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum autem mortuus esset Hesron, ingressus est Caleb ad Ephratha. Habuit quoque Hesron uxorem Abia, quæ peperit ei Assur patrem Thecuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַחַ֥ר מוֹת־חֶצְר֖וֹן בְּכָלֵ֣ב אֶפְרָ֑תָה וְאֵ֤שֶׁת חֶצְרוֹן֙ אֲבִיָּ֔ה וַתֵּ֣לֶד ל֔וֹ אֶת־אַשְׁח֖וּר אֲבִ֥י תְקֽוֹעַ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And when Hesron was dead, Caleb went in to Ephrata. Hesron also had to wife Abia who bore him Ashur the father of Thecua.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Hetsron oli kuollut Kalebin Ephratassa, niin Hetsronin emäntä Abia synnytti hänelle Assurin Tekoan isän.
verses.king_james: And after that Hezron was dead in Caleb–ephratah, then Abiah Hezron’s wife bare him Ashur the father of Tekoa.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nati sunt autem filii Jerameel primogeniti Hesron, Ram primogenitus ejus, et Buna, et Aram, et Asom, et Achia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּהְי֧וּ בְנֵי־יְרַחְמְאֵ֛ל בְּכ֥וֹר חֶצְר֖וֹן הַבְּכ֣וֹר ׀ רָ֑ם וּבוּנָ֥ה וָאֹ֛רֶן וָאֹ֖צֶם אֲחִיָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Jerameel the firstborn of Hesron, were Ram his firstborn, and Buna, and Aram, and Asom, and Achia.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jerahmeelilla Hetsronin esikoisella olivat lapset: hänen esikoisensa Ram, ja Buna, Oren, Otsem ja Ahia.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Jerahmeel the firstborn of Hezron were, Ram the firstborn, and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozem, and Ahijah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Duxit quoque uxorem alteram Jerameel, nomine Atara, quæ fuit mater Onam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתְּהִ֨י אִשָּׁ֥ה אַחֶ֛רֶת לִֽירַחְמְאֵ֖ל וּשְׁמָ֣הּ עֲטָרָ֑ה הִ֖יא אֵ֥ם אוֹנָֽם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Jerameel married another wife, named Atara, who was the mother of Onam.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jerahmeelilla oli vielä toinen emäntä, hänen nimensä oli Atara, hän on Onamin äiti.
verses.king_james: Jerahmeel had also another wife, whose name was Atarah; she was the mother of Onam.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et filii Ram primogeniti Jerameel fuerunt Moos, Jamin, et Achar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּהְי֥וּ בְנֵי־רָ֖ם בְּכ֣וֹר יְרַחְמְאֵ֑ל מַ֥עַץ וְיָמִ֖ין וָעֵֽקֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Ram the firstborn of Jerameel, were Moos, Jamin, and Achar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Ramin Jerahmeelin esikoisen lapset: Maats, Jamin ja Eker.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Ram the firstborn of Jerahmeel were, Maaz, and Jamin, and Eker.

verses.latin_vulgate: Onam autem habuit filios Semei et Jada. Filii autem Semei : Nadab et Abisur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּהְי֥וּ בְנֵי־אוֹנָ֖ם שַׁמַּ֣י וְיָדָ֑ע וּבְנֵ֣י שַׁמַּ֔י נָדָ֖ב וַאֲבִישֽׁוּר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Onam had sons Semei, and Jada. And the sons of Semei: Nadab, and Abisur.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Onamilla olivat lapset: Samai ja Jada; Samain lapset: Nadab ja Abisur.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Onam were, Shammai, and Jada. And the sons of Shammai; Nadab, and Abishur.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nomen vero uxoris Abisur, Abihail, quæ peperit ei Ahobban et Molid.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשֵׁ֛ם אֵ֥שֶׁת אֲבִישׁ֖וּר אֲבִיהָ֑יִל וַתֵּ֣לֶד ל֔וֹ אֶת־אַחְבָּ֖ן וְאֶת־מוֹלִֽיד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the name of Abisur's wife was Abihail, who bore him Ahobban, and Molid.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Abisurin emännän nimi oli Abihail, ja hän synnytti hänelle Ahbanin ja Molidin.
verses.king_james: And the name of the wife of Abishur was Abihail, and she bare him Ahban, and Molid.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Nadab fuerunt Saled et Apphaim. Mortuus est autem Saled absque liberis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֥י נָדָ֖ב סֶ֣לֶד וְאַפָּ֑יִם וַיָּ֥מׇת סֶ֖לֶד לֹ֥א בָנִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Nadab were Saled and Apphaim. And Saled died without children.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nadabin lapset: Seled ja Appaim. Ja Seled kuoli lapsetonna.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Nadab; Seled, and Appaim: but Seled died without children.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filius vero Apphaim, Jesi : qui Jesi genuit Sesan. Porro Sesan genuit Oholai.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֥י אַפַּ֖יִם יִשְׁעִ֑י וּבְנֵ֤י יִשְׁעִי֙ שֵׁשָׁ֔ן וּבְנֵ֥י שֵׁשָׁ֖ן אַחְלָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the son of Apphaim was Jesi: and Jesi begot Sesan. And Sesan begot Oholai.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Appaimin lapset: Jisei; ja Jisein lapset: Sesan; Sesanin lapset: Ahlai.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Appaim; Ishi. And the sons of Ishi; Sheshan. And the children of Sheshan; Ahlai.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Jada fratris Semei : Jether, et Jonathan. Sed et Jether mortuus est absque liberis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֤י יָדָע֙ אֲחִ֣י שַׁמַּ֔י יֶ֖תֶר וְיוֹנָתָ֑ן וַיָּ֥מׇת יֶ֖תֶר לֹ֥א בָנִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Jada the brother of Semei: Jether and Jonathan. And Jether also died without children.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jodan Sammain veljen lapset: Jeter ja Jonatan. Ja Jeter kuoli lapsetonna.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Jada the brother of Shammai; Jether, and Jonathan: and Jether died without children.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Jonathan genuit Phaleth, et Ziza. Isti fuerunt filii Jerameel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֥י יוֹנָתָ֖ן פֶּ֣לֶת וְזָזָ֑א אֵ֥לֶּה הָי֖וּ בְּנֵ֥י יְרַחְמְאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: But Jonathan begot Phaleth, and Ziza. These were the sons of Jerameel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jonatanin lapset: Pelet ja Sasa: nämät ovat Jerahmeelin lapset.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Jonathan; Peleth, and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sesan autem non habuit filios, sed filias : et servum ægyptium nomine Jeraa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־הָיָ֧ה לְשֵׁשָׁ֛ן בָּנִ֖ים כִּ֣י אִם־בָּנ֑וֹת וּלְשֵׁשָׁ֛ן עֶ֥בֶד מִצְרִ֖י וּשְׁמ֥וֹ יַרְחָֽע׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Sesan had no sons, but daughters and a servant an Egyptian, named Jeraa.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sesanilla ei ollut yhtään poikaa, vaan tyttäriä. Ja Sesanilla oli Egyptiläinen palvelia, hänen nimensä oli Jarha.
verses.king_james: Now Sheshan had no sons, but daughters. And Sheshan had a servant, an Egyptian, whose name was Jarha.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deditque ei filiam suam uxorem : quæ peperit ei Ethei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֨ן שֵׁשָׁ֧ן אֶת־בִּתּ֛וֹ לְיַרְחָ֥ע עַבְדּ֖וֹ לְאִשָּׁ֑ה וַתֵּ֥לֶד ל֖וֹ אֶת־עַתָּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he gave him his daughter to wife: and she bore him Ethei.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Sesan antoi Jarhalle palveliallensa tyttärensä emännäksi, hän synnytti hänelle Attain.
verses.king_james: And Sheshan gave his daughter to Jarha his servant to wife; and she bare him Attai.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ethei autem genuit Nathan, et Nathan genuit Zabad.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתַּי֙ הֹלִ֣יד אֶת־נָתָ֔ן וְנָתָ֖ן הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־זָבָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Ethei begot Nathan, and Nathan begot Zabad.
verses.finnish_biblia: Attai siitti Natanin, Natan siitti Sabadin.
verses.king_james: And Attai begat Nathan, and Nathan begat Zabad,

verses.latin_vulgate: Zabad quoque genuit Ophlal, et Ophlal genuit Obed.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְזָבָד֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־אֶפְלָ֔ל וְאֶפְלָ֖ל הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־עוֹבֵֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Zabad begot Ophlal, and Ophlal begot Obed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sabad siitti Ephlalin, Ephlal siitti Obedin.
verses.king_james: And Zabad begat Ephlal, and Ephlal begat Obed,

verses.latin_vulgate: Obed genuit Jehu, Jehu genuit Azariam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעוֹבֵד֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־יֵה֔וּא וְיֵה֖וּא הֹלִ֥יד אֶת־עֲזַרְיָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Obed begot Jehu, Jehu begot Azarias.
verses.finnish_biblia: Obed siitti Jehun, Jehu siitti Asarian.
verses.king_james: And Obed begat Jehu, and Jehu begat Azariah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Azarias genuit Helles, et Helles genuit Elasa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽעֲזַרְיָה֙ הֹלִ֣יד אֶת־חָ֔לֶץ וְחֶ֖לֶץ הֹלִ֥יד אֶת־אֶלְעָשָֽׂה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Azarias begot Helles, and Helles begot Elasa.
verses.finnish_biblia: Asaria siitti Haletsin, ja Halets siitti Elasan.
verses.king_james: And Azariah begat Helez, and Helez begat Eleasah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Elasa genuit Sisamoi, Sisamoi genuit Sellum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶלְעָשָׂה֙ הֹלִ֣יד אֶת־סִֽסְמָ֔י וְסִסְמַ֖י הֹלִ֥יד אֶת־שַׁלּֽוּם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Elasa begot Sisamoi, Sisamoi begot Sellum,
verses.finnish_biblia: Elasa siitti Sismain, ja Sismai siitti Sallumin.
verses.king_james: And Eleasah begat Sisamai, and Sisamai begat Shallum,

verses.latin_vulgate: Sellum genuit Icamiam, Icamia autem genuit Elisama.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׁלּוּם֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־יְקַמְיָ֔ה וִיקַמְיָ֖ה הֹלִ֥יד אֶת־אֱלִישָׁמָֽע׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Sellum begot Icamia, and Icamia begot Elisama.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sallum siitti Jekamian, ja Jekamia siitti Elisaman.
verses.king_james: And Shallum begat Jekamiah, and Jekamiah begat Elishama.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Caleb fratris Jerameel : Mesa primogenitus ejus ; ipse est pater Ziph : et filii Maresa patris Hebron.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֤י כָלֵב֙ אֲחִ֣י יְרַחְמְאֵ֔ל מֵישָׁ֥ע בְּכֹר֖וֹ ה֣וּא אֲבִי־זִ֑יף וּבְנֵ֥י מָרֵשָׁ֖ה אֲבִ֥י חֶבְרֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now the sons of Caleb the brother of Jerameel were Mesa his firstborn, who was the father of Siph: and the sons of Maresa father of Hebron.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kalebin Jerahmeelin veljen lapset: Mesa hänen esikoisensa; hän on Siphin isä: ja Maresan Hebronin isän lapset.
verses.king_james: Now the sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel were, Mesha his firstborn, which was the father of Ziph; and the sons of Mareshah the father of Hebron.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro filii Hebron, Core, et Taphua, et Recem, et Samma.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י חֶבְר֑וֹן קֹ֥רַח וְתַפֻּ֖חַ וְרֶ֥קֶם וָשָֽׁמַע׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Hebron, Core, and Thaphua, and Recem, and Samma.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Hebronin lapset: Kora, Tappua, Rekem ja Samma.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Hebron; Korah, and Tappuah, and Rekem, and Shema.

verses.latin_vulgate: Samma autem genuit Raham, patrem Jercaam, et Recem genuit Sammai.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשֶׁ֣מַע הוֹלִ֔יד אֶת־רַ֖חַם אֲבִ֣י יׇרְקְעָ֑ם וְרֶ֖קֶם הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־שַׁמָּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Samma begot Raham, the father of Jercaam, and Recem begot Sammai.
verses.finnish_biblia: Samma siitti Rahamin Jorkamin isän; ja Rekem siitti Sammain.
verses.king_james: And Shema begat Raham, the father of Jorkoam: and Rekem begat Shammai.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filius Sammai, Maon : et Maon pater Bethsur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבֶן־שַׁמַּ֖י מָע֑וֹן וּמָע֖וֹן אֲבִ֥י בֵֽית־צֽוּר׃
verses.douay_rheims: The son of Sammai, Maon: and Maon the father of Bethsur.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Sammain poika Maon, ja Maon oli Betsurin isä.
verses.king_james: And the son of Shammai was Maon: and Maon was the father of Beth–zur.

verses.latin_vulgate: Epha autem concubina Caleb peperit Haran, et Mosa, et Gezez. Porro Haran genuit Gezez.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעֵיפָה֙ פִּילֶ֣גֶשׁ כָּלֵ֔ב יָ֥לְדָ֛ה אֶת־חָרָ֥ן וְאֶת־מוֹצָ֖א וְאֶת־גָּזֵ֑ז וְחָרָ֖ן הֹלִ֥יד אֶת־גָּזֵֽז׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Epha the concubine of Caleb bore Haran, and Mosa, and Gezez. And Haran begot Gezez.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Epha Kalebin vaimo synnytti Haranin, Motsan ja Gaseksen; ja Haran siitti Gaseksen.
verses.king_james: And Ephah, Caleb’s concubine, bare Haran, and Moza, and Gazez: and Haran begat Gazez.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Jahaddai, Regom, et Joathan, et Gesan, et Phalet, et Epha, et Saaph.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י יׇהְדָּ֑י רֶ֧גֶם וְיוֹתָ֛ם וְגֵישָׁ֥ן וָפֶ֖לֶט וְעֵיפָ֥ה וָשָֽׁעַף׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Jahaddai, Rogom, and Joathan, and Gesan, and Phalet, and Epha, and Saaph.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jahdain lapset: Regem, Jotam, Gesan, Pelet, Epha ja Saaph.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Jahdai; Regem, and Jotham, and Geshan, and Pelet, and Ephah, and Shaaph.

verses.latin_vulgate: Concubina Caleb Maacha, peperit Saber, et Tharana.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פִּילֶ֤גֶשׁ כָּלֵב֙ מַֽעֲכָ֔ה יָ֥לַד שֶׁ֖בֶר וְאֶֽת־תִּרְחֲנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Maacha the concubine of Caleb bore Saber, and Tharana.
verses.finnish_biblia: Maeka Kalebin vaimo synnytti Seberin ja Tirhenan.
verses.king_james: Maachah, Caleb’s concubine, bare Sheber, and Tirhanah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Genuit autem Saaph pater Madmena Sue, patrem Machbena et patrem Gabaa. Filia vero Caleb fuit Achsa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֵּ֗לֶד שַׁ֚עַף אֲבִ֣י מַדְמַנָּ֔ה אֶת־שְׁוָ֛א אֲבִ֥י מַכְבֵּנָ֖ה וַאֲבִ֣י גִבְעָ֑א וּבַת־כָּלֵ֖ב עַכְסָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Saaph the father of Madmena begot Sue the father of Machbena, and the father of Gabaa. And the daughter of Caleb was Achsa.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän synnytti myös Saaphin Madmannan isän ja Sjevan Makbenan isän ja Gibean isän. Ja Aksa oli Kalebin tytär.
verses.king_james: She bare also Shaaph the father of Madmannah, Sheva the father of Machbenah, and the father of Gibea: and the daughter of Caleb was Achsah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hi erant filii Caleb, filii Hur primogeniti Ephratha, Sobal pater Cariathiarim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֤לֶּה הָיוּ֙ בְּנֵ֣י כָלֵ֔ב בֶּן־ח֖וּר בְּכ֣וֹר אֶפְרָ֑תָה שׁוֹבָ֕ל אֲבִ֖י קִרְיַ֥ת יְעָרִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: These were the sons of Caleb, the son of Hur the firstborn of Ephrata, Sobal the father of Cariathiarim.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät olivat Kalebin lapset Hurin pojan Ephratan esikoisen: Sobal, Kirjatjearimin isä,
verses.king_james: These were the sons of Caleb the son of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah; Shobal the father of Kirjath–jearim,

verses.latin_vulgate: Salma pater Bethlehem, Hariph pater Bethgader.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שַׂלְמָא֙ אֲבִ֣י בֵֽית־לָ֔חֶם חָרֵ֖ף אֲבִ֥י בֵית־גָּדֵֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Salma the father of Bethlehem, Hariph the father of Bethgader.
verses.finnish_biblia: Salma Betlehemin isä, Hareph Betgaderin isä.
verses.king_james: Salma the father of Beth–lehem, Hareph the father of Beth–gader.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuerunt autem filii Sobal patris Cariathiarim, qui videbat dimidium requietionum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּהְי֤וּ בָנִים֙ לְשׁוֹבָ֔ל אֲבִ֖י קִרְיַ֣ת יְעָרִ֑ים הָרֹאֶ֖ה חֲצִ֥י הַמְּנֻחֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Sobal the father of Cariathiarim had sons: he that saw half of the places of rest.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Sobalilla Kirjatjearimin isällä oli poikia: Haroe, Hatsimenyhot.
verses.king_james: And Shobal the father of Kirjath–jearim had sons; Haroeh, and half of the Manahethites.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de cognatione Cariathiarim, Jethrei, et Aphuthei, et Semathei, et Maserei. Ex his egressi sunt Saraitæ, et Esthaolitæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִשְׁפְּחוֹת֙ קִרְיַ֣ת יְעָרִ֔ים הַיִּתְרִי֙ וְהַפּוּתִ֔י וְהַשֻּׁמָתִ֖י וְהַמִּשְׁרָעִ֑י מֵאֵ֗לֶּה יָֽצְאוּ֙ הַצָּ֣רְעָתִ֔י וְהָאֶשְׁתָּ֖אֻֽלִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of the kindred of Cariathiarim, the Jethrites, and Aphuthites, and Semathites, and Maserites. Of them came the Saraites, and Esthaolites.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Kirjatjearimin sukukunnat: Jetriläiset, Putilaiset, Sumatilaiset ja Misrailaiset. Heistä ovat Zorgatilaiset ja Estaolilaiset tulleet.
verses.king_james: And the families of Kirjath–jearim; the Ithrites, and the Puhites, and the Shumathites, and the Mishraites; of them came the Zareathites, and the Eshtaulites.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Salma, Bethlehem, et Netophathi, coronæ domus Joab, et dimidium requietionis Sarai :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י שַׂלְמָ֗א בֵּ֥ית לֶ֙חֶם֙ וּנְט֣וֹפָתִ֔י עַטְר֖וֹת בֵּ֣ית יוֹאָ֑ב וַחֲצִ֥י הַמָּנַחְתִּ֖י הַצׇּרְעִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Salma, Bethlehem, and Netophathi, the crowns of the house of Joab, and half of the place of rest of Sarai.
verses.finnish_biblia: Salman lapset, Betlehem ja Netophatilaiset, Joabin huoneen kruunut; ja puoli osaa Manatilaisista ovat Zorgilaiset.
verses.king_james: The sons of Salma; Beth–lehem, and the Netophathites, Ataroth, the house of Joab, and half of the Manahethites, the Zorites.

verses.latin_vulgate: cognationes quoque scribarum habitantium in Jabes, canentes atque resonantes, et in tabernaculis commorantes. Hi sunt Cinæi, qui venerunt de Calore patris domus Rechab.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִשְׁפְּח֤וֹת סֹֽפְרִים֙ (ישבו) [יֹשְׁבֵ֣י] יַעְבֵּ֔ץ תִּרְעָתִ֥ים שִׁמְעָתִ֖ים שׂוּכָתִ֑ים הֵ֚מָּה הַקִּינִ֣ים הַבָּאִ֔ים מֵחַמַּ֖ת אֲבִ֥י בֵית־רֵכָֽב׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the families of the scribes that dwell in Jabes, singing and making melody, and abiding in tents. These are the Cinites, who came of Calor (Chamath) father of the house of Rechab.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kirjoittajain sukukunnat, jotka asuivat Jabeksessa, ovat Tirgatilaiset, Simealaiset, Sukatilaiset. Nämät ovat Kiniläiset, jotka ovat tulleet Hammatista Rekabin huoneen isästä.
verses.king_james: And the families of the scribes which dwelt at Jabez; the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, and Suchathites. These are the Kenites that came of Hemath, the father of the house of Rechab.
